$comment: Mobile Header Lite Left Component Tokens
$description: Component tokens for Mobile Header Lite Left component - the left section of Header Lite with leading icon, optional image/avatar, optional icon, title with optional info/error icons, optional badge/tag, and optional subtitle. Supports multiple sizes (lg, md, sm), disabled state, and optional badge. Figma Reference: Node ID 546-36659

$component.name: Header Lite Left
$component.description: The left section component of Header Lite that provides flexible content display with leading icon, optional image/avatar, optional icon, title text with optional info/error icons, optional badge/tag indicator, and optional subtitle text. Supports multiple size variants and disabled state for different mobile interface contexts.
$component.structure: Horizontal flex container with leading icon (40px), content group with optional image, optional icon, title section (title text with optional info/error icons and optional badge), and optional subtitle. Layout uses flexbox with configurable gap spacing between elements.

sizes.lg: Large size - Title 14px semibold, Subtitle 12px regular, Image 34px×24px, Icon 24px, Info/Error icons 16px, Badge height 24px
sizes.md: Medium size - Title 13px semibold, Subtitle 11px regular, Image 28.33px×20px, Icon 20px, Info/Error icons 14px, Badge height 22px
sizes.sm: Small size - Title 12px semibold, Subtitle 10px regular, Image 25.5px×18px, Icon 18px, Info/Error icons 12px, Badge height 18px

size.lg: Large size variant with larger typography and icon sizes
size.md: Medium size variant with medium typography and icon sizes
size.sm: Small size variant with smaller typography and icon sizes

state.default: Default enabled state with full color and opacity
state.disabled: Disabled state with gray-300 colors and reduced opacity for badge

badge.present: Badge/tag displayed after error icon in title section

subtitle.present: Subtitle text displayed below title section

info.present: Info icon displayed after title text

error.present: Error icon displayed after info icon

icon.none: No icon displayed in content group

image-leading.present: Image/avatar displayed as leading element in content group

usage.contexts: Mobile header components, list headers, navigation items, content displays, detail page headers, card headers
usage.features: Multiple size variants, Optional elements (image, icon, info, error, badge, subtitle), Disabled state support, Flexible content layout, Leading icon navigation
